sourceScope.primarySourceFile: Practice Notes/AAA - Model Regulation XXX - Dec 2006.pdf
sourceScope.sourceReference: American Academy of Actuaries practice note, December 2006
sourceScope.sourceStatusNote: Non-binding practice note / companion guidance; not authoritative regulatory text.

observedSectionWindows.note: Front matter, introduction, purpose/scope, early regulatory requirements, and the first group-life boundary questions.
X-factor selection, classing, credibility, and mortality-distribution / approximation methods.
Reinsurance, mean reserve / tax reserve handling, substandard policy discussion, and AG XXXVIII / secondary-guarantee questions.

boundaries: Keep planning focused on this single practice note file.
Do not widen into the other Practice Notes files in the same folder.
Keep VM-20, VM-21, VM-22, VM-A, VM-C, VM-G, VM-M, VM-30, and VM-31 references review-only unless the same batch intentionally includes the referenced operational text.
Keep ASOP 40 and AG XXXVIII references review-only unless the same batch captures the quoted operational language.
Keep the disclaimer and the non-binding status visible as companion-guidance context, not as authoritative regulatory text.
Use page locators as the primary citation anchor; line references are not expected for this PDF slice.
exclusions: No full-document processing outside this source file.
No eLearning scripts, slides, quizzes, or app exports.
No raw source files in Git.
No other Practice Notes files in the same wave.
